headline: Mettler-Toledo International (NYSE:MTD) Surfaces as a Quality Investing Candidate on Caviar Cruise Screen
summary: Mettler-Toledo (MTD) passes a quality investing screen with high profitability, strong ROIC of 64%, and manageable debt, making it a candidate for long-term, durable growth.
